implementedFoundations.prohibitedUse: Medical advice, private-data access or proof of regulatory status

implementedFoundations.lawfulBasis: No personal data is required; query remains on device
implementedFoundations.validationPlan: 150+ question benchmark, citation tests, Chromium and WebKit acceptance
implementedFoundations.prohibitedUse: Generation, diagnosis, availability confirmation or regulated decision
implementedFoundations.rollback: Disable semantic activation; conventional search remains

implementedFoundations.intendedDecision: Prepare evidence and exception views for human review
implementedFoundations.lawfulBasis: Must be established per operational source and purpose before real data
implementedFoundations.validationPlan: Role, CSRF, injection, citation, customer-isolation and audit tests
implementedFoundations.prohibitedUse: Automatic writes, approvals, release or publication

roadmapOnly.requiredData: Sufficient governed historical demand, lead-time, shortage and product data
roadmapOnly.validationPlan: Baseline comparison, time-based backtesting, error by segment, drift and override review
roadmapOnly.modelRisk: Sparse history, leakage, drift and false certainty
roadmapOnly.monitoring: Accuracy, bias, drift, override and stockout outcomes
roadmapOnly.rollback: Return to approved human planning baseline

roadmapOnly.requiredData: Canonical product, batch, supplier, quality, order, temperature, custody and document events
roadmapOnly.lawfulBasis: Contract, legal obligation and legitimate interests as applicable
roadmapOnly.validationPlan: Event completeness and reconciliation against source systems
roadmapOnly.prohibitedUse: Treating blockchain or immutability as proof that source data are correct
roadmapOnly.monitoring: Missing events, reconciliation failures and access anomalies
roadmapOnly.rollback: Canonical audit records and controlled documents

roadmapOnly.requiredData: Controlled safety system and qualified oversight

roadmapOnly.prohibitedUse: Treating machine extraction as verified text
Background microphone access or transcript retention

roadmapOnly.validationPlan: Device, model, licence, grounding and safety benchmark
roadmapOnly.prohibitedUse: Primary search, medical content or unsupported claims
roadmapOnly.modelRisk: Hallucination, download size and device exclusion
